attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
STGO.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN_KEY,
STGO.PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
STGO.CREATE_DTM,
STGO.DV_CREATE_DT,
STGO.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY,
STGO.SK_MESSAGE_ID,
STGO.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,
STGO.SK_TAN_ID_INT,
STGO.TAN_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
STGO.TAN_ITEM_KEY,
STGO.ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NRPBT.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT
  MESSAGE_ID       AS SK_MESSAGE_ID,
  PID_LINE_ID      AS SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,
  TAN_ID           AS SK_TAN_ID_INT,
SRPTBT.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN_KEY  ,
NRPBD.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY,
NIIT.ITEM_KEY AS TAN_ITEM_KEY,
CASE WHEN  PROCESS_STATUS  = 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS = 'E' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS  = 'N' THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(STG.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    AS CREATE_DTM,
CAST(STG.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_CREATE_DT,
NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY as TAN_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY, 
STG.ACTION_CODE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ATAN_IFACE STG
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN SRPTBT
ON STG.MESSAGE_ID= SRPTBT.SK_MESSAGE_ID
AND  STG.PID_LINE_ID= SRPTBT.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
AND  STG.TAN_ID= SRPTBT.SK_TAN_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS  NRPB
  ON STG.MESSAGE_ID=NRPB.SK_MESSAGE_ID
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL NRPBD  
ON STG.MESSAGE_ID=NRPBD.SK_MESSAGE_ID
  AND STG.PID_LINE_ID=NRPBD.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT 
  ON STG.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NIIT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT     
  AND NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY=NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  MESSAGE_ID       AS SK_MESSAGE_ID,
  PID_LINE_ID      AS SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,
  TAN_ID           AS SK_TAN_ID_INT,
SRPTBT.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN_KEY,
NRPBD.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY,
NIIT.ITEM_KEY AS TAN_ITEM_KEY,
CASE WHEN  PROCESS_STATUS  = 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS = 'E' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS  = 'N' THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(EX.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    AS CREATE_DTM,
CAST(EX.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_CREATE_DT,
NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY as TAN_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY, 
EX.ACTION_CODE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ATAN_IFACE EX
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN SRPTBT
ON EX.MESSAGE_ID= SRPTBT.SK_MESSAGE_ID
AND  EX.PID_LINE_ID= SRPTBT.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
AND  EX.TAN_ID= SRPTBT.SK_TAN_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS  NRPB
  ON EX.MESSAGE_ID=NRPB.SK_MESSAGE_ID
  INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL NRPBD  
ON EX.MESSAGE_ID=NRPBD.SK_MESSAGE_ID
  AND EX.PID_LINE_ID=NRPBD.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT 
  ON EX.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NIIT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT     
  AND NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY=NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
  )STGO
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN NRPBT
 ON STGO.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN_KEY=NRPBT.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN_KEY

SELECT 
TAN_ID,
REQUEST_ID,
CREATION_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
MESSAGE_ID,
PID_LINE_ID,
TAN_INTEGER,
TAN_QUANTITY,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
B2B_MFG_STATUS,
RETRY_COUNT,
PROCESS_STATUS,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2,
ATTRIBUTE3,
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE6,
ATTRIBUTE7,
ATTRIBUTE8,
ATTRIBUTE9,
ATTRIBUTE10,
ATTRIBUTE11,
ATTRIBUTE12,
ATTRIBUTE13,
ATTRIBUTE14,
ATTRIBUTE15,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
BATCH_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT 
TAN_ID,
REQUEST_ID,
CREATION_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
MESSAGE_ID,
PID_LINE_ID,
TAN_INTEGER,
TAN_QUANTITY,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
B2B_MFG_STATUS,
RETRY_COUNT,
PROCESS_STATUS,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2,
ATTRIBUTE3,
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE6,
ATTRIBUTE7,
ATTRIBUTE8,
ATTRIBUTE9,
ATTRIBUTE10,
ATTRIBUTE11,
ATTRIBUTE12,
ATTRIBUTE13,
ATTRIBUTE14,
ATTRIBUTE15,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
BATCH_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ATAN_IFACE STG
)STGO
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  SK_MESSAGE_ID FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS )SP
WHERE STGO.MESSAGE_ID=SP.SK_MESSAGE_ID
)
OR NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  SK_MESSAGE_ID,SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL )SP
WHERE STGO.MESSAGE_ID=SP.SK_MESSAGE_ID
AND STGO.PID_LINE_ID=SP.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
)
OR NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT, BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
, $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS  NRPB
							WHERE NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY= NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY)SP
WHERE STGO.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=SP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
)
OR NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  SK_MESSAGE_ID,SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,SK_TAN_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN )SP
WHERE STGO.MESSAGE_ID= SP.SK_MESSAGE_ID
AND  STGO.PID_LINE_ID= SP.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
AND  STGO.TAN_ID= SP.SK_TAN_ID_INT
)

SELECT  
RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMP.MESSAGE_ID,SMP.PID_LINE_ID  ,  SMP.TAN_ID) + MAX_VAL RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN_KEY,
SMP.MESSAGE_ID AS SK_MESSAGE_ID, 
 SMP.PID_LINE_ID      AS SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,
  SMP.TAN_ID           AS SK_TAN_ID_INT 
  FROM  
	(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
	FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN ) SMPO,
( 	
SELECT STG.MESSAGE_ID,STG.PID_LINE_ID,STG.TAN_ID
	FROM
	( 
	SELECT   MESSAGE_ID  ,  PID_LINE_ID  ,  TAN_ID , INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ATAN_IFACE STG
UNION ALL
	SELECT   MESSAGE_ID ,  PID_LINE_ID  ,  TAN_ID , INVENTORY_ITEM_ID FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ATAN_IFACE EX
)STG
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS  NRPB
  ON STG.MESSAGE_ID=NRPB.SK_MESSAGE_ID
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL NRPBD  
ON STG.MESSAGE_ID=NRPBD.SK_MESSAGE_ID
  AND STG.PID_LINE_ID=NRPBD.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT 
  ON STG.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NIIT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT     
  AND NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY=NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
	) SMP		  
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_TAN SMPO
	WHERE SMPO.SK_MESSAGE_ID = SMP.MESSAGE_ID
	AND   SMPO.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT=SMP.PID_LINE_ID
    AND   SMPO.SK_TAN_ID_INT =SMP.TAN_ID
    )
